business_data.name: Lakeside Cafe - Coffee PMB
business_data.address: Seattle Coffee Company, 9 Armitage Rd, Town Hill, Pietermaritzburg, 3201, South Africa

reviews.text: The food was delicious and the service was good.
reviews.author: Themba Ntamane

reviews.text: Visited the place with family .Lovely atmosphere  with kids enjoying feeding the ducks at the pond .Spectacular seating overlooking the pond with ducks going about there daily lives. Restaurant  was busy and staff and management under pressure. Service was spot on and meals arrived fresh and piping hot and absolutely w
reviews.author: Viren Maharaj

reviews.text:
Almost no vegan options
A man who I assume was the manager was too handsy
I asked if they had an iced latte, they said no but they have some other thing, they brought the other thing and it was an iced latte with sugar
Oat milk on the menu but they don't have oat milk
Avo toast is only one slice with too much avo, just
reviews.author: Tian Landman

reviews.text: While they're listed on Google Maps as "pet friendly" they would not even allow us to sit outside if we have a small dog with us. So, they wouldn't even allow us to sit outside on the concrete benches, outside their own premises. Sad.
reviews.author: IBFSA Pty Ltd
